AboutPage.title: What is National Social Protection Council?
AboutPage.description: The National Social Protection Council (NSPC) is a governmental body responsible for formulating and implementing social protection policies and programs in Cambodia.​​​​​​​ Established to address the needs of vulnerable populations, the NSPC aims to enhance social welfare, reduce poverty, and promote inclusive development across the country. The council collaborates with various stakeholders, including government agencies, non-governmental organizations, and international partners, to design and execute initiatives that provide social safety nets, improve access to essential services, and support economic empowerment for disadvantaged groups. Through its efforts, the NSPC plays a crucial role in fostering social cohesion and ensuring that all citizens have the opportunity to lead dignified and productive lives.

VisionPage.title: Our Vision
VisionPage.paragraph: NSPC envisions a Cambodia where every person enjoys dignity, social security and opportunity. We strive to build resilient communities through inclusive policies and strong partnerships.

GoalsPage.title: Our Goals
GoalsPage.intro: The National Social Protection Council pursues a set of strategic goals to promote equity, reduce vulnerability, and ensure access to essential services for all Cambodians.

goal1.title: Inclusive Protection
goal1.desc: Design social programs that reach the most vulnerable and leave no one behind.

goal2.title: Poverty Reduction
goal2.desc: Implement targeted support to sustainably lift households out of poverty.

goal3.title: Access to Services
goal3.desc: Improve access to health, education and social services for all communities.

goal4.title: Resilience & Capacity
goal4.desc: Strengthen household and community resilience to shocks and stresses.

ObjectivesPage.title: What We Do?
ObjectivesPage.nspcName: The National Social Protection Council (NSPC) of Cambodia
ObjectivesPage.descriptionRest: is the high-level body responsible for developing, regulating, and harmonizing the national social protection system to reduce poverty and vulnerability.

0.title: Startup Nurturing
0.desc: Nurturing and growing digital startups into successful and sustainable businesses through accelerator programs.

1.title: Community
1.desc: Enhancing stakeholder interaction through meetups, capacity building, and networking events.

2.title: Digital Platform
2.desc: Developing platforms and services that startups can plug into to find resources and investors.

3.title: Research
3.desc: Conducting trusted research to provide accurate data and resources for startups and stakeholders.

4.title: Enterprises Go Digital
4.desc: Strengthening enterprises' digital capabilities through adoption and enabling participation in the digital economy.

ContactPage.title: Get in Touch
ContactPage.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the NSPC website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Cambodia. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this Site.

sections.title: 2. Use of the Website
sections.content:
This Site is provided for informational purposes about social protection policies, programs, and resources managed by the National Social Protection Council (NSPC). You agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of others.

You must not:

  • Use the Site in any way that violates any applicable law or regulation
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Site or its systems
  • Scrape, harvest, or extract data from the Site without prior written permission
  • Transmit any unsolicited or unauthorized advertising material or other forms of solicitation
  • Knowingly transmit any data or material containing viruses, trojans, or other malicious code

sections.title: 3. Account Registration
sections.content: To access certain features of the Site, you may be required to register for an account. When you register, you agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information; maintain and promptly update your account information; keep your password confidential and not share it with any third party; accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account; and notify NSPC immediately if you suspect any unauthorized use of your account. NSPC reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these terms.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content published on this Site — including text, publications, laws, policy documents, reports, images, graphics, and logos — is the property of the National Social Protection Council and/or the Royal Government of Cambodia, protected under applicable intellectual property laws. You may download and print materials for personal, non-commercial use only, provided that you retain all copyright and proprietary notices. Any other reproduction, redistribution, or commercial use requires prior written consent from NSPC.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Activities
sections.content:
The following activities are strictly prohibited on this Site:

  • Impersonating any person, entity, or government official, including NSPC staff
  • Publishing or transmitting any content that is false, misleading, or defamatory
  • Interfering with or disrupting the integrity or performance of the Site or its related systems
  • Attempting to probe, scan, or test the vulnerability of any NSPC system or network
  • Using the Site for any form of illegal commercial activity

sections.title: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: The information on this Site is provided for general informational purposes only. While NSPC endeavors to keep content accurate and up-to-date, it makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the information. Nothing on this Site constitutes legal, financial, or professional advice.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, NSPC and the Royal Government of Cambodia shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your access to or use of (or inability to use) this Site, or from any errors or omissions in its content, even if NSPC has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

sections.title: 8. External Links
sections.content: This Site may contain links to external websites operated by third parties. These links are provided for your convenience only. NSPC has no control over the content of those sites and accepts no responsibility for them or for any loss or damage that may arise from your use of them. The inclusion of a link does not imply endorsement by NSPC.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.content: NSPC reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time without prior notice. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the Site. The "Last Updated" date at the top of this page will reflect the most recent revision. Your continued use of the Site following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Cambodia. Any disputes arising under or in connection with these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

sections.title: 11. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

  • Email: info@nspc.gov.kh
  • Address: National Social Protection Council, Phnom Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia

Privacy.contactAddress: National Social Protection Council, Phnom Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content:
When you use our Site or register for an account, we may collect the following types of information:

  • Personal Information: Your full name, email address, and any other information you voluntarily provide when registering or contacting us
  • Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent on the Site, links clicked, browser type, device type, and IP address
  • Cookies & Tracking Data: Information collected through cookies and similar technologies

We do not collect sensitive personal data (such as health records, financial information, or identification numbers) unless explicitly required and with your informed consent.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: NSPC uses the information we collect to: create and manage your account, respond to your inquiries and requests, send you updates and newsletters if you opt in, analyze and improve the Site, and comply with legal obligations. We will not use your personal information for unrelated purposes without your explicit consent.

sections.title: 3. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: We process your personal information on the following legal bases: Consent (where given), Legitimate Interest (e.g., site improvement and security), and Legal Obligation (where required by law).

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: NSPC does not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your data in limited circumstances: with government partners for official coordination, with trusted service providers under data processing agreements, or when disclosure is required by law.

sections.title: 5. Cookies & Tracking
sections.content: Our Site uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. We use essential cookies (session management, language preference) and analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to understand visitor behavior. You can control cookies through your browser settings; disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, or as required by applicable law. Account data is kept for the duration of your active account and for a reasonable period afterwards.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: You have rights including access, correction, deletion, withdrawal of consent, and objection to processing. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details in the Contact section.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
sections.content: NSPC takes reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information, including encrypted transmission (HTTPS), access controls, and security reviews. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.content: This Site is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

sections.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: NSPC may update this Privacy Policy periodically. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

sections.title: 11. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have any questions or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact our Data Protection team:

  • Email: info@nspc.gov.kh
  • Address: National Social Protection Council, Phnom Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia
